title: Creamy Italian Chicken Tagine
description: A garlicky and silky Italian dish featuring chicken cooked in a clay tagine with white vinegar and broiled to perfection, halal-friendly and full of adventurous flavors.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large clay tagine, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the tagine and cook until browned on all sides for 5-6 minutes.
Add the white vinegar, chicken broth, and dried thyme to the tagine and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the tagine to the broiler and top with grated parmesan cheese.
Broil for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
